goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'steakhouse' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'west'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '8 people' at '17:45' on 'monday'.
If the booking fails how about 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in 'the type of guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve steakhouse food and should be in the moderate price range
The restaurant should be in the west
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 17:45 on monday
If the booking fails how about thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get whether they have internet and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
